subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán, upon thee rest My Glory, My Bounty and My Mercy! Verily, the Servant in Attendancecame and made mention of thee in Our presence
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی و عنایتی و رحمتی قد حضر العبد الحاضر و ذکرک تلقاء الوجه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @naming of children; of individuals
